clear day: Change the street scene to a clear, sunny day.
Add bright sunlight casting long shadows on the street.
Make the street scene vibrant and sun-drenched.
Fill the street scene with the warm glow of an afternoon sun.
Render the street under a clear blue sky.
night: Change the street scene to night.
Add bright streetlights and glowing windows to the dark street.
Render the street under a dark sky with stars.
Make the street scene a quiet, empty city street at night.
Set the scene on a bustling city street at night.
sunset: Change the street scene to sunset.
Add the warm, golden hour light to the street scene.
Render the street scene with a beautiful, orange sunset sky.
Cast long, dramatic shadows across the street during sunset.
Make the street scene glow with the vibrant colors of the sunset.
rainy day: Change the street scene to a rainy day.
Add heavy rain, making the street pavement wet and reflective.
Make it rain on the street.
Create a street scene during a gentle downpour, with wet asphalt.
foggy day: Change the street scene to a foggy morning.
Add thick fog to the street, partially obscuring buildings.
Create a mysterious street scene shrouded in dense fog.
Cover the street in a light mist, with streetlights glowing.
Set the street scene on a cold and foggy day, with low visibility.
snowy day: Change the street scene to a snowy day.
Cover the street and buildings with a layer of fresh snow.
Add gently falling snowflakes over the quiet street.
Create a peaceful, winter street scene covered in snow.
Turn the street into a scene from a heavy snowstorm.
cloudy day: Change the street scene to an overcast day.
Cover the sky above the street with thick, gray clouds.
Make the street scene look gloomy under an overcast sky.

Set the street scene on a cool, cloudy afternoon.
